title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: CPU/GPU runner for Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma & more with a single CLI and REST API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama API—works in Node & browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; pip install ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter that plugs any Ollama model into chains, agents, RAG, etc.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (now renamed “Open WebUI”).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client SDK for Ollama with POJO model mapping.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama HTTP API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI with syntax highlighting and chat history.

title: ollama-copilots
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for running Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Multi-arch Docker image (cpu/cuda/rocm) with automatic model downloads.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for RAG, fine-tuning, function-calling, and edge deployments.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with async streaming and dependency-injection helpers.

title: ollama-dify
summary: Dify low-code LLM platform added Ollama as a native model provider.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Streamlit app that does RAG over PDFs using Ollama embeddings + Chroma.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model.

title: ollama-mistral-finetune
summary: Scripts to create quantized Mistral LoRAs and serve them via Ollama.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake providing reproducible Ollama builds for Linux x86_64 & aarch64.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library used internally by the ollama CLI.
